name: TVS Electronics Limited
summary: TVS Electronics Limited, through its subsidiaries, designs, manufactures, assembles, markets, sells, and services various transaction automation products in India and internationally. The company operates through Products & Solutions, Customer Support Services, and Fulfillment & Distribution Services segments. Its products include dot matrix printers, mechanical keyboards, thermal printers, label printers, barcode scanners, electronic cash registers, membrane keyboards, mouse products, and currency counting machines. The company also provides repair engineering, installation and demo, remote tech support, call center, and parts management services. It serves governance and back office, oil, mining, manufacturing, BFSI, food and beverage, retail, hospitality, and ticketing industries. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Chennai, India. TVS Electronics Limited is a subsidiary of TVS Investments Private Limited.
